scripts.build: pnpm run build:maps:leaflet && pnpm run build:maps:maplibre && pnpm run build:core && pnpm run build:layers && pnpm run build:storybook
scripts.storybook: mkdir -p storybook/.storybook-home && HOME=$PWD/storybook/.storybook-home XDG_CONFIG_HOME=$PWD/storybook/.storybook-home STORYBOOK_DISABLE_TELEMETRY=1 storybook dev -c storybook/.storybook --port 6006 --exact-port
scripts.build:storybook: mkdir -p storybook/.storybook-home && HOME=$PWD/storybook/.storybook-home XDG_CONFIG_HOME=$PWD/storybook/.storybook-home STORYBOOK_DISABLE_TELEMETRY=1 storybook build -c storybook/.storybook -o storybook/storybook-static
scripts.lint: eslint storybook/.storybook storybook/src packages/core/src packages/layers/src packages/maps/leaflet/src packages/maps/maplibre/src packages/core/vite.config.js packages/maps/leaflet/vite.config.js packages/maps/maplibre/vite.config.js packages/layers/vite.config.js --ext .js,.jsx,.mjs
scripts.lint:fix: eslint storybook/.storybook storybook/src packages/core/src packages/layers/src packages/maps/leaflet/src packages/maps/maplibre/src packages/core/vite.config.js packages/maps/leaflet/vite.config.js packages/maps/maplibre/vite.config.js packages/layers/vite.config.js --ext .js,.jsx,.mjs --fix
